message:
feat(reaper): add multi-database reap to gt reaper reap (gt-wfs-65mig)

When --db is omitted, auto-discover all databases and reap stale wisps
across each one. Prints per-database results plus a summary with alert
threshold check (warns if >500 open wisps remain). Single-db mode
(--db=X) still works. JSON output returns an array for consistency.

Previously required --db for single-database reap. Now matches the
multi-database pattern established in gt reaper scan.
